channel.title: Zero Trust on krisby.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Zero Trust on krisby.dev

item.title: Conditional Access + Identity Protection Lab
item.description:
This lab was built to understand how risk-based Conditional Access and Identity Protection work in Microsoft Entra ID.

The goal was to:

  • Create risk-based Conditional Access policies
  • Force MFA on risky sign-ins
  • Understand user risk and sign-in risk
  • Test Identity Protection in practice
  • Analyze risky users and risky sign-ins

Architecture

User Sign-In → Identity Protection → Risk Detection → Conditional Access → MFA

Step 1 — Preparation

Verify that the tenant has the right features enabled:

item.title: Entra ID + Cloudflare Access + SCIM
item.description:
This lab was set up to understand how federation, provisioning and Zero Trust work in practice between Entra ID and Cloudflare Access.

The goal was to:

  • Use Entra ID as Identity Provider
  • Set up OIDC authentication
  • Set up SCIM provisioning
  • Automate sync of users and groups
  • Test group-based access via Cloudflare Access

Architecture

Entra ID → OIDC → Cloudflare Access

Entra ID → SCIM → Cloudflare

Step 1 — Create App Registration in Entra ID

The first step was to create an App Registration in Entra ID.
